header: Content Columns for polished editorial system

items.content: A sharp, production-minded content columns using shadcn-style rhythm, semantic tokens, and concise copy so content teams can publish clearer stories with reusable blocks.
Built to show the content columns with real labels, compact spacing, modern imagery, and practical states instead of placeholder filler.
Clean hierarchy, restrained borders, and direct actions make this content columns easy to scan across desktop and mobile previews.
